scope.summary: Correct the wallet support truth table so it matches the default thin-driver modes actually reported by the server.
out_of_scope: Adding an OCI SDK token source or changing wallet loader behavior.

entry_points.name: doctor wallet mode truth table
entry_points.trace: supported_wallet_modes reports ewallet.pem, cwallet.sso, and ewallet.p12 as supported; doctor consumes that production mode list, while README and configuration describe the same password-bearing versus auto-login distinctions.

limitations: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/target cargo check -p oraclemcp-db passed in the shared working tree. This close claims no live wallet connection or source-exact clean-worktree test run.
